expectations.name: skill_invoked
expectations.evidence: Detection report explicitly references SKILL.md framework detection table and function-templates.md. Structured analysis follows skill process.

expectations.name: python_detected
expectations.evidence: Report states: 'Language: Python, Framework: Flask, Build tool: pyproject.toml'.

expectations.name: safety_for_security
expectations.text: Safety or pip-audit suggested for CVE checking
expectations.evidence: Security mapped to 'safety' (already in dev deps). Also mentions pip-audit as alternative from function-templates.md.

expectations.name: pytest_cov_for_coverage
expectations.evidence: Testability mapped to pytest-cov with command 'pytest --cov=src --cov-fail-under=90'. Threshold correctly set to 90 (from architecture.md), not template default 80.

expectations.name: import_linter_for_modularity
expectations.text: import-linter or similar suggested for circular import detection
expectations.evidence: Modularity mapped to import-linter. Noted it is NOT yet in dev deps and would need to be added.

expectations.name: correct_commands
expectations.evidence: All commands are Python-specific: 'safety check', 'pytest --cov=src --cov-fail-under=90', 'lint-imports'. No JS/Node commands present.
